ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account (hashed for security) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Primary email address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "lockout_expiration" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the account will be unlocked after multiple failed login attempts */,
  "two_factor_auth_enabled" INTEGER /* Whether two-factor authentication is enabled */,
  "two_factor_auth_secret" TEXT /* Secret for two-factor authentication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_accounts" (
  "email_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email account */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the email account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Verification status of the email account */,
  "primary" INTEGER /* Whether the email account is primary for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the email account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the email account */,
  "last_verified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last verification */,
  "verification_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed verification attempts */,
  "lockout_expiration" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the email will be unlocked after multiple failed verification attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("email_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_accounts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "verification_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each verification request */,
  "email_id" INTEGER /* ID of the email account being verified */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the verification request was sent */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the verification request expires */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the verification request was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the verification request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the verification request (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_verification_requests_email_id FOREIGN KEY ("email_id") REFERENCES email_accounts ("email_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "verification_codes" (
  "code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each verification code */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the verification request the code belongs to */,
  "code" TEXT /* Verification code sent to the user */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the verification code expires */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the verification code was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the verification code */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed attempts to use the verification code */,
  "is_used" INTEGER /* Whether the verification code has been used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_verification_codes_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES verification_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., login, logout, update) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the log entry was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who triggered the event */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user who triggered the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date the session started */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the session expires */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the session was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auth_tokens" (
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each token */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the token */,
  "token" TEXT /* Authentication token */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the token expires */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the token was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auth_tokens_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject line of the email */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the email */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the template was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the template */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_resets" (
  "reset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password reset request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user requesting a password reset */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the password reset request was made */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the password reset request expires */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the password reset request was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the password reset request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the password reset request (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_resets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_reset_tokens" (
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password reset token */,
  "reset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the password reset request the token belongs to */,
  "token" TEXT /* Password reset token */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the password reset token expires */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the password reset token was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the password reset token */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed attempts to use the password reset token */,
  "is_used" INTEGER /* Whether the password reset token has been used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_reset_tokens_reset_id FOREIGN KEY ("reset_id") REFERENCES password_resets ("reset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
